candidate_definitions.text: Template for Obsidian community plugins with build configuration and development best practices.
This is a sample plugin for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md).
Obsidian Plugin to execute code in a note.
<div align='right'>
QuickAdd for Obsidian
A plugin for Obsidian.md for styling codeblocks and inline code

A dynamic user interface for adjusting theme, plugin, and snippet CSS variables within Obsidian

This plugin allows snippet, theme, and plugin CSS files to define a set of configuration options. It then allows users to see all the tweakable settings in one settings pane. Style Settings allows both toggling classes on and off the `body` element, as well as setting numeric, s…
A data index and query language over Markdown files, for https://obsidian.md/.
Treat your [Obsidian Vault](https://obsidian.md/) as a database which you can query from. Provides a JavaScript API and
Add typed-links to your Obsidian notes
> [!IMPORTANT]
Adds admonition block-styled content to Obsidian.md

The Admonition plugin for Obsidian is a tool that allows you to create attention-grabbing callouts, tips, warnings and other informative blocks within your notes. The plugin provides a range of pre-defined icons to pick from, as well as the ability to create your own custom styl…
BRAT - Beta Reviewer's Auto-update Tool for Obsidian.
![](media/brat.jpg)
A template plugin for obsidian
![templater_logo](./imgs/templater_logo.svg)
Create Dungeons and Dragons style statblocks for Obsidian.md
The documentation for Fantasy Statblocks has moved [here](https://plugins.javalent.com/home).
Integrate Git version control with automatic commit-and-sync and other advanced features in Obsidian.md
A powerful community plugin for [Obsidian.md](Obsidian.md) that brings Git integration right into your vault. Automatically commit, pull, push, and see your changes — all within Obsidian.
Hide Obsidian UI elements such as tooltips, status, titlebar and more
This plugin enables you to hide certain parts of the Obsidian UI. Note that your CSS theme may override Hider.
A minimal and aesthetically pleasing highlighting menu that makes color-coded highlighting much easier 🎨.
![Highlightr-Plugin Downloads](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/chetachiezikeuzor/Highlightr-Plugin/total.svg)
Take advantage of YAML front-matter in generating notes from templates (for obsidian.md)
Take advantage of YAML front-matter in generating notes from templates
A plugin for templating in Obsidian, powered by Nunjucks.
![GitHub tag (latest by date)](https://img.shields.io/github/v/tag/garyng/obsidian-temple?label=release&style=for-the-badge)
Adds interactive maps to Obsidian.md using Leaflet.js
> **Development Status**: Maintenance Mode
An Obsidian.md plugin that adds a minimal text editor modal for a smoother writing/editing experience ✍🏽.
![cMenu-Plugin Downloads](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/chetachiezikeuzor/cMenu-Plugin/total.svg)
This plugin adds a `data-tag-name` attribute to all top-level preview `div`s, allowing contextual typography. Note: this plugin does not add any styles, but enables contextual styling.
Converts quotes to curly quotes, dashes to em dashes, and periods to ellipses

Spotlight your active pane
This is a plugin for [Obsidian](https://obsidian.md) that spotlights your active pane to make it more obvious.
Andy Matuschak Mode as a plugin

[![GitHub release (latest SemVer)](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/deathau/sliding-panes-obsidian?style=for-the-badge&sort=semver)](https://github.com/deathau/sliding-panes-obsidian/releases/latest)
Materialize Todoist tasks in Obsidian notes
![Sync with Todoist Plugin for Obsidian](./docs/static/img/social-card.jpg)
Simple calendar widget for Obsidian.
This plugin for [Obsidian](https://obsidian.md/) creates a simple Calendar view for visualizing and navigating between your daily notes.
Create markdown-backed Kanban boards in Obsidian.
**The Kanban plugin is looking for new maintainers.** Interested? [Read more here.](https://github.com/mgmeyers/obsidian-kanban/blob/main/MAINTAINERS.md)
Create/manage your daily, weekly, and monthly notes in Obsidian
The Periodic Notes plugin expands on the idea of daily notes and introduces weekly and monthly notes.
Insert and import citations, bibliographies, notes, and PDF annotations from Zotero into Obsidian.

Insert and import citations, bibliographies, notes, and PDF annotations from Zotero into Obsidian. Requires the [Better BibTeX for Zotero](https://retorque.re/zotero-better-bibtex/installation/) plugin.
